response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong full-stack, distributed systems exposure, and meaningful geospatial experience via GISCollective. However, the role explicitly requires modern C++ or Rust as the primary technology, and the resume shows only brief C/C++ work a decade ago at National Instruments with no Rust experience. Core systems-level routing/navigation pipeline experience is also absent. Worth a screening call given the geospatial background and demonstrated ability to learn across stacks, but the language gap is significant.
strengths: Direct geospatial/GIS platform experience as founder of GISCollective
Distributed, low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of req/sec)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, Linux, polyglot adaptability
concerns: No modern C++ experience; last C/C++ role was 2014-2015 at National Instruments
No Rust experience listed anywhere in resume or projects
No navigation/routing tile pipeline or map data transformation background
